title: FAMILY SUPPORT AND CONNECTIONS - 211info
text: OPTIONS COUNSELING AND FAMILY SERVICES ROSEBURG FAMILY SUPPORT AND CONNECTIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The Family Support and Connections Program provides parent skills training, support accessing community resources, home management help, and support for families receiving TANF benefits. The provider will assess the family's needs, co-create a family plan of action, and collaborate with other ODHS providers and community agencies. 283 SE Fowler Street Suite 2 Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Families receiving TANF benefits who have a referral from an ODHS Self-Sufficiency Case Manager Hours: No standard hours (541) 464-6455 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 464-6455 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Referrals through ODHS Self Sufficiency. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Referral documents AREA SERVED: Douglas County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Downtown by the Main Library. UTRANS stop at library. Services: Child Abuse Prevention Child Abuse Support Groups Parenting Skills Classes Specialized Information and Referral * Parenting Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - IN-HOME SAFETY AND REUNIFICATION SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING CLASSES MUTUAL SUPPORT - KEEP If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OPTIONS COUNSELING AND FAMILY SERVICES ROSEBURG
